reviews.comment:
Ypf muy chica para ser ACA y la última de bandera del territorio, muy poco personal lo que hace largas colas es una YPF más ..los playeros muy amables...

(Translated by Google)
YPF is very small for an ACA station and the last major brand in the area; very few staff, which causes long lines. It's just another YPF station... the attendants are very friendly...

reviews.comment:
Una YPF que no acepta tarjeta Previaje????? Cuesta mucho que la acepten en el norte y donde lo hacen te hacen recargo… pero en una YPF que no la acepten?????? La estación de servicio de bandera y un plan del gobierno para favorecer el turismo???
Si a esto le sumamos el desastroso servicio y los minutos de espera, hace que mi calificación sea generosa

(Translated by Google)
A YPF station that doesn't accept the Previaje card????? It's so difficult to get it accepted in the north, and where it is, they charge extra… but a YPF station that won't accept it?????? This is a state-owned gas station and part of a government program to promote tourism???
Add to that the disastrous service and the long wait times, and my rating is generous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNla09XdXN3RRAB
